evals.name: obsidian-handoff
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Decide whether this request belongs in pdf-reader or obsidian-cli: "OCR the scanned PDF attachment and return per-page JSON."
evals.expected_output: Routes the task to pdf-reader because extraction is the hard part.

evals.name: chunk-large-pdf
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Explain the first extraction command you would run for a 200-page PDF when the user only needs pages 10-20 in JSON.
evals.expected_output: Uses pdf-reader with pages and json flags.
